candidates.why: Direct operating revenue line; best match for top-line sales.
Also a revenue total and matches the same values; suitable fallback if label changes over time.
Section header, not the numeric revenue line.

candidates.why: Direct cost-of-revenue line; best match for COGS/cost of sales.
Component of cost of revenue, but less complete than the explicit cost-of-revenue row.

A component of materials/COGS, not the full COGS line.
A component of COGS, not the full direct cost line.
Balance-sheet inventory row, not an income-statement expense.

candidates.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A row and semantically strongest match; per rules, prefer explicit SG&A row over components/subtotals.

Too broad and includes COGS/other operating items; inferior to explicit SG&A.
Not operating overhead; wrong concept.
Header, not expense.

candidates.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: This is not an R&D expense line; it indicates SG&A excluding R&D, which implies XSGA chosen already excludes R&D.
